name: Menubar
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Menubar wrapper composed from the local Base UI Menubar primitive, local class canonicalization, local SVG check and chevron icons, deterministic slots, and static examples for every dossier-listed Menubar demo.

registry.reason: shadcn Menubar composes the local Base UI Menubar primitive.
Base UI Menubar composes the local Menu primitive for item, submenu, checked, radio, and popup semantics.
shadcn Menubar uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native wrapper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema literals for Menubar style options.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React Menubar primitive is replaced by the local Foldkit Base UI Menubar implementation.
Origin Base UI React Menu primitive is replaced by the local Foldkit Base UI Menu implementation.
Origin check and chevron icons are represented by local inline SVG helpers in this batch.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local deterministic RTL example data.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: MenubarCheckbox
examples.description: Menubar checkbox items with local checked state.

examples.title: MenubarDemo
examples.description: Default browser-style menubar with grouped items, checkbox items, radio items, shortcuts, and submenus.

examples.title: MenubarIcons
examples.description: Menubar items with local icon slots.

examples.title: MenubarRadio
examples.description: Menubar radio groups with model-owned selected values.

examples.title: MenubarRtl
examples.description: RTL menubar using deterministic local translations.

examples.title: MenubarSubmenu
examples.description: Menubar with nested submenu content rendered through local Menu composition.

deviations.summary: The shadcn wrapper composes local Menubar attributes instead of importing upstream Base UI React primitives.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must not import React or upstream Base UI runtime packages.

deviations.summary: Check and chevron icons use local inline SVG helpers instead of lucide-react.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. The local SVGs preserve the icon slots, geometry, and aria-hidden contract.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local deterministic direction and labels instead of the origin app language selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector.

deviations.summary: Positioner, content, and submenu content expose side, align, offset, and collision attributes without runtime DOM measurement or collision flipping.
deviations.rationale: Measured collision behavior belongs behind a shared measurement service, not inside the shadcn render helper.
